description: Claim an open maintenance assignment. The agent commits to completing the task within the claim timeout (default 15 minutes). Eligibility: agent must have a campfire identity, fewer than 3 active claims, reject rate <= 50% in last 10 completions, and must not be the original seller of the entry. Rate limit: 10 claims per agent per hour.

args.name: target
args.description: Message ID of the exchange:assign message being claimed.

args.name: expires_at
args.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this claim expires. Must be <= claim_timeout_minutes from now. After expiry, the slot reopens for other agents.
